project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 App Router with React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript 5
build_system: npm/bun - Next.js bundler, no typecheck script defined in package.json
verification_instructions: 1. Run bun run lint (zero errors/warnings). 2. Run bun run build (successful Next.js build with no errors).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No typecheck script - TypeScript validated during build. No test runner configured.
contribution_requirements: Zero TypeScript errors, zero ESLint warnings, successful build. Responsive design (desktop/tablet/mobile). Loading/empty/error states. Semantic HTML with ARIA labels. No console.log in production code. Follow design token system from globals.css. Use Lucide React icons. Follow glass hierarchy (glass-subtle through glass-ultra).
key_patterns: Components in app/components/. Lib services in lib/. Server Components by default, 'use client' only when needed. Color extraction via lib/color-extraction.ts (useColorExtraction hook). DynamicColorProvider context for ambient colors. Glass hierarchy classes: glass-subtle, glass-light, glass-medium, glass-heavy, glass-ultra. Motion tokens: --duration-micro (150ms), --duration-standard (250ms), --duration-complex (350ms), --duration-page (500ms). Easing: --ease-spring, --ease-smooth. Animation classes: animate-fade-in, animate-slide-up, animate-on-scroll-slide-up. ArtistHero pattern: parallax bg, gradient overlays, portrait with glow, stats pills, action buttons. ArtistNav pattern: sticky nav that appears on scroll with section buttons. ShareMenu: dropdown with copy/apple-music/youtube/download options. AlbumActions: wraps FavoriteAlbumButton + ShareMenu.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - all shared components (~77 files). app/album/[id]/ - album page with page.tsx, loading.tsx, error.tsx. app/artist/[id]/ - artist page (pattern reference). lib/ - service layer (itunes, spotify, lastfm, youtube, music-service, color-extraction, recommendations, etc). types/ - additional type definitions. public/ - static assets.
